ux_guidelines.Description: Anchor links should scroll smoothly to target section
ux_guidelines.Do: Use scroll-behavior: smooth on html element

ux_guidelines.Description: Fixed nav should not obscure content
ux_guidelines.Do: Add padding-top to body equal to nav height
ux_guidelines.Don't: Let nav overlap first section content

ux_guidelines.Description: Current page/section should be visually indicated
ux_guidelines.Do: Highlight active nav item with color/underline
ux_guidelines.Don't: No visual feedback on current location

ux_guidelines.Description: Users expect back to work predictably
ux_guidelines.Do: Preserve navigation history properly

ux_guidelines.Description: URLs should reflect current state for sharing
ux_guidelines.Do: Update URL on state/view changes

ux_guidelines.Description: Show user location in site hierarchy
ux_guidelines.Do: Use for sites with 3+ levels of depth

ux_guidelines.Description: Too many animations cause distraction and motion sickness
ux_guidelines.Do: Animate 1-2 key elements per view maximum

ux_guidelines.Description: Animations should feel responsive not sluggish
ux_guidelines.Do: Use 150-300ms for micro-interactions
ux_guidelines.Don't: Use animations longer than 500ms for UI

ux_guidelines.Description: Respect user's motion preferences
ux_guidelines.Do: Check prefers-reduced-motion media query

ux_guidelines.Description: Show feedback during async operations
ux_guidelines.Do: Use skeleton screens or spinners
ux_guidelines.Don't: Leave UI frozen with no feedback

ux_guidelines.Description: Hover effects don't work on touch devices
ux_guidelines.Do: Use click/tap for primary interactions
ux_guidelines.Don't: Rely only on hover for important actions

ux_guidelines.Description: Infinite animations are distracting
ux_guidelines.Do: Use for loading indicators only

ux_guidelines.Description: Some CSS properties trigger expensive repaints
ux_guidelines.Do: Use transform and opacity for animations

ux_guidelines.Description: Linear motion feels robotic
ux_guidelines.Do: Use ease-out for entering ease-in for exiting

ux_guidelines.Description: Stacking context conflicts cause hidden elements
ux_guidelines.Do: Define z-index scale system (10 20 30 50)

ux_guidelines.Description: Hidden overflow can clip important content
ux_guidelines.Do: Test all content fits within containers

ux_guidelines.Description: Fixed elements can overlap or be inaccessible
ux_guidelines.Do: Account for safe areas and other fixed elements
ux_guidelines.Code Example Good: Fixed nav + fixed bottom with gap

ux_guidelines.Description: New stacking contexts reset z-index
ux_guidelines.Do: Understand what creates new stacking context
ux_guidelines.Don't: Expect z-index to work across contexts

ux_guidelines.Description: Layout shift when content loads is jarring
ux_guidelines.Do: Reserve space for async content

ux_guidelines.Description: 100vh can be problematic on mobile browsers
ux_guidelines.Do: Use dvh or account for mobile browser chrome
